tasks.title: webhook signature unit tests
tasks.description: Unit tests for backend/src/services/webhook/signature.ts — signPayload (deterministic HMAC-SHA256), verifySignature (match, mismatch, length mismatch).

tasks.title: webhook dispatch unit tests
tasks.description: Unit tests for backend/src/services/webhook/dispatch.ts — dispatch (event filter, fetch POST, response ok, fetch error, multiple registrations, non-matching event skipped).

tasks.title: webhook events unit tests
tasks.description: Unit tests for backend/src/services/webhook/events.ts — event creation helpers, event type constants.

tasks.title: router registration tests
tasks.description: Unit tests for backend/src/api/router.ts — verify all route paths are registered (GET/POST/DELETE/PATCH for invoices, api-keys, webhooks, settlements, reputation).

tasks.title: dashboard-activity handler unit tests
tasks.description: Unit tests for backend/src/api/dashboard-activity.ts — response shape, activity list format, empty state.
